name: Code4rena
description: Competitive audit platform where security researchers race to find vulnerabilities in smart contracts with guaranteed bounties.

seo.title: Code4rena — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Code4rena: Competitive audit platform where security researchers race to find vulnerabilities in smart contracts with guaranteed bounties.

when_to_use: Competitive smart contract audit before protocol launch
Bug bounty program for DeFi protocol vulnerability discovery
Community security review for open-source blockchain projects
Pre-audit triage using C4 scout findings
Ongoing contest-based security testing for protocol upgrades

pros: Competitive model finds bugs solo auditors miss
Transparent public contest reports build trust
Guaranteed bounty pool de-risks contests for researchers
Access to hundreds of wardens in parallel
cons: Report triage can bury real issues under duplicates
Contest format rewards speed over deep review
Protocols need clean, documented code before contest starts
No NDA means findings are eventually public
review.verdict: Crowdsourced audits unearth bugs traditional firms miss, but triage and public disclosure aren't for everyone.
review.best_for: Well-prepared DeFi protocols wanting adversarial coverage before mainnet launch.
review.not_for: Teams needing confidential audits or those shipping unfinished, undocumented code.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
